tool.name: PGGB
tool.description: build a pangenome variation graph (wfmash + seqwish + smoothxg + gfaffix + odgi)

param.label: Input multi-FASTA (PanSN-renamed)
param.help: A single FASTA (typically bgzipped) of all haplotypes, with PanSN-spec headers (SAMPLE#HAP#CONTIG).

param.label: Number of haplotypes (-n)
param.help: Total haplotypes in the input. Automatically computed if names follow PanSN-spec.

param.label: seqwish min match length (-k)
param.help: Filter exact matches below this length during graph induction. Default 23 is optimal up to ~5% divergence.

param.label: Mappings per segment (-c)
param.help: Number of mappings retained per segment in wfmash. Defaults to 1; raise for highly diverse panels.

param.label: PanSN exclude-delimiter (-Y)
param.help: Skip mappings where query and target share a prefix before this delimiter. Must match the delimiter used in PanSN-renamed headers.

param.label: POA target lengths (-G)
param.help: Comma-separated POA target lengths; smoothxg iterates once per length. pggb default: 700,900,1100.

param.label: POA score parameters (-P)
param.help: match,mismatch,gap1,ext1,gap2,ext2 OR a preset (asm5,asm10,asm15,asm20). Default is asm5 = 1,19,39,3,81,1.

param.label: POA padding ratio (-O, blank = pggb default 0.001)
param.help: Flanking sequence length as fraction of average sequence length per block.

param.label: Write MAF output (-M)
param.help: Multi-Alignment Format representing merged POA blocks.

param.label: Generate MultiQC report (-m)
param.help: Automatically runs odgi stats and produces a MultiQC report.

param.label: Skip 1D/2D viz (-v)
param.help: Suppresses layout PNG and viz outputs. Speeds up small test runs.

param.label: VCF spec (-V, blank = off)
param.help: Reference path prefix(es) for vg deconstruct, e.g. 'ref:1000'. Multiple comma-separated. Set blank to skip.

tool.help:
**PGGB** — PanGenome Graph Builder.
Builds a variation graph from a PanSN-renamed multi-FASTA via the standard pangenome pipeline:
wfmash (mapping) -> seqwish (graph induction) -> smoothxg (POA smoothing) -> gfaffix (affix collapse) -> odgi (final binary graph)
This wrapper invokes the upstream `pggb` orchestrator as-is, preserving its internal smoothxg-iteration loop. The wrapper exposes the most commonly tuned parameters; full advanced control is available by running the underlying tools (`wfmash`, `seqwish`, `smoothxg`, `gfaffix`, `odgi`) directly.
-----
**Inputs**
- `Input multi-FASTA` — a *single* file (typically bgzipped) containing all haplotypes. Headers MUST follow PanSN-spec: `SAMPLE#HAP#CONTIG`. - `Number of haplotypes` — total haplotype count. Automatically computed if names follow PanSN-spec.
**Key parameters**
- `--segment-length` (`-s`): wfmash seed length (default 5000). - `--map-pct-id` (`-p`): identity threshold (90 intra-species; 70-80 inter-species). - `--min-match-len` (`-k`): seqwish minimum match length (default 23). - `--exclude-delim` (`-Y`): PanSN delimiter; must match input headers. - `--vcf-spec` (`-V`): set to a reference accession prefix to emit a VCF via `vg deconstruct`.
**Outputs**
- Smoothed GFA1 (gzipped). - odgi binary graph (.og). - 2D layout (.og.lay) and layout/viz PNGs (unless `--skip-viz`). - Run log. - (Optional) deconstruct VCF if `--vcf-spec` is set.
-----
**Resource notes**
`pggb` is the heavy step in the pipeline. The wrapper tags OOM-style failures so Galaxy admins can auto-resubmit to a larger runner.
